title: CLI API token lifecycle + IoT custom authorizer for MQTT
description: Implement DynamoDB-backed API token registry, admin token endpoints, kbs token commands, and AWS IoT custom authorizer for CLI MQTT access without OAuth.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Implemented CLI token lifecycle backend and IoT custom authorizer path in CDK, Lambda, and Rust CLI/config plumbing.
Evidence: Added token_admin.py + mqtt_authorizer.py, DynamoDB+Secrets+IoT Authorizer resources/routes, new kbs cloud token create|list|revoke commands, custom-authorizer MQTT config in gossip/config docs; cargo test and infra tests pass.
Next: execute live IoT custom-authorizer subscribe test with issued token and capture deny cases for revoked/expired/cross-tenant.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: CLI token lifecycle + IoT custom authorizer implementation landed and pushed.
Evidence: commit 385d623 on dev; token admin API, DynamoDB+secret store, IoT custom authorizer, and kbs cloud token CLI commands integrated; test suites green.
Next: run live token create/list/revoke and MQTT subscribe deny/allow matrix in deployed env.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Progress: CLI token/MQTT live matrix is queued but cannot execute until deploy state is recovered.
Evidence: token resources are not safely deployable while stack is UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED and recovery call is AccessDenied.
Next: after rollback recovery and redeploy, run create/list/revoke + MQTT allow/deny matrix and attach outputs.
Risk/Blocker: BLOCKED on CloudFormation recovery IAM permission.
